name: Test login functionality with different user credentials -- @1.4

steps.name: Given User is able to reach login url (# prerequisite step)
When User enters username in the username field "performance_glitch_user"
And User enters password in the password field "secret_sauce"
And User clicks on the login button
Then User should be navigated to the landing page
